sql_array: CREATE TABLE timestamps_test (id INT, ts1 TIMESTAMPTZ, ts2 TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO timestamps_test VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '1992-09-20 20:38:48', TIMESTAMPTZ '1992-03-22 01:02:03.1234');
INSERT INTO timestamps_test VALUES (2, NULL, TIMESTAMPTZ '1990-01-01 10:00:00');
INSERT INTO timestamps_test VALUES (3, TIMESTAMPTZ '2000-02-29 12:00:00', TIMESTAMPTZ '2000-02-28 12:00:00');
INSERT INTO timestamps_test VALUES (4, TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 00:00:00', TIMESTAMPTZ '1999-12-31 23:59:59');
INSERT INTO timestamps_test VALUES (5, TIMESTAMPTZ '1990-01-01 10:00:00', NULL);
SELECT id, greatest(ts1, ts2) AS max_timestamp FROM timestamps_test WHERE ts1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, ts1, ts2, ~EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM greatest(ts1, ts2)) AS negated_epoch FROM timestamps_test;
SELECT id, greatest(ts1, ts2), ~ (ts2 IS NOT NULL)::INT FROM timestamps_test WHERE ts2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts1;
SELECT id, greatest(ts1, ts2), SUM(~(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ts1) - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ts2))) AS epoch_diff FROM timestamps_test GROUP BY id HAVING greatest(ts1, ts2) IS NOT NULL;
WITH timestamp_stats AS (SELECT id, greatest(ts1, ts2) AS max_ts FROM timestamps_test) SELECT max_ts, ~COUNT(*) FROM timestamp_stats GROUP BY max_ts HAVING max_ts IS NOT NULL;
